mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.sort AS "sort", a.title AS "title", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_mibao_faq( id, sort, title, del_flag, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sort}, #{title}, #{delFlag}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
